steps.t: The waggon is somewhere on the main road in Elderslade. You should search for the waggon.
The waggon is on the main road in Elderslade. You should more closely inspect the waggon.
The waggon is on the main road in Elderslade. You should collect the supplies.
Hertha can be found at Shakal-atrâd. You should bring the supplies to Hertha.
